headline: How Is Rocket Lab Strengthening Its End-to-End Space Model?
summary: RKLB is building an end-to-end space model launch, spacecraft systems and mission ops to diversify revenues and deepen its market position.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider L3Harris Technologies (LHX) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Investors may be wondering whether L3Harris Technologies at around US$308 a share is still offering value, or if most of the upside is already reflected in the price. The stock is up 35.8% over the last year and 77.5% over three years, even though it is down 12.0% over the past month and has slipped 0.4% in the last week, with a modest 1.2% gain year to date. Recent attention on L3Harris has centered on its role in the Aerospace & Defense sector, with investors watching contract activity,...
